task_completion.description: Open the custom configuration file for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) or terminal command modifying the file at '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js'.

task_completion.description: Apply the setting to disable P2P connections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact string 'config.p2p = { enabled: false };' visible within the custom-config.js file in the editor or terminal output.

task_completion.description: Join the specified target room in Jitsi Meet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to a Jitsi Meet instance with the room name 'Telehealth-Test' visible in the URL or UI.

task_completion.description: Join the room with two separate participants named 'Doctor' and 'Patient'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two separate browser windows/tabs or two video tiles within the same room showing the participant names 'Doctor' and 'Patient'.

task_completion.description: Open the connection status details in the Jitsi Meet interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The connection status popover or dialog box is open and visible over the Jitsi Meet video interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the connection is routed through the Jitsi Videobridge (JVB) and not P2P.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The connection status popover explicitly shows the transport type or connection as 'JVB' or 'Bridge' (and does NOT show 'P2P').

task_completion.description: Save the required screenshot evidence to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using scrot, maim, or import), a save dialog, or an image viewer confirming a screenshot was saved to '/home/ga/p2p_disabled_evidence.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to interact with Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) are visible, rather than just terminal outputs or mocked HTML files.

integrity.description: The connection status popover is a genuine Jitsi Meet UI element.
integrity.visual_evidence: The popover matches the standard Jitsi Meet styling and overlays the video interface, not appearing as a manually edited text file or disconnected UI element.

integrity.description: The agent actively saved the screenshot rather than just leaving windows open.
integrity.visual_evidence: Execution of a screenshot tool command in the terminal or a GUI screenshot tool saving the file to the exact requested path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The configuration file is located at '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js'. The required setting to disable P2P is 'config.p2p = { enabled: false };'. The target room is 'Telehealth-Test'. The final evidence screenshot must be saved to '/home/ga/p2p_disabled_evidence.png' and show two participants ('Doctor' and 'Patient') with the connection status popover displaying 'JVB' or 'Bridge' (indicating video traffic is routed through the Jitsi Videobridge, not P2P).
